2024-25 Belmont Bruins Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 22-11 (13-7, 4th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Casey Alexander

PS/G: 79.3 (52nd of 364)

PA/G: 76.6 (309th of 364)

SRS: 1.94 (121st of 364)

SOS: -0.12 (139th of 364)

ORtg: 112.2 (71st of 364)

DRtg: 108.4 (279th of 364)
